1.description: (Color online) Average Difference in Investment Between Treated and Control Groups in Distressed Firms Around the 2014 EMC Ruling Notes. The figure displays the coefficients of interactions between quarter dummy variables and 𝑇 𝑟 𝑒 𝑎 𝑡 𝑖 Treat i , and 95% confidence intervals of coefficients. The treated group includes firms with outstanding bonds with an offering amount of $10 million or above from 2013 to 2016. The sample is limited to distressed firms, as defined by a default probability exceeding 10% in December 2014. The sample period spans from 2013Q1 to 2016Q4. The event date is 2014Q4.
